title: Junior Software Engineer- AI Native Pods
company_focus: Digital bank lending to ambitious UK businesses
description:
At OakNorth, we’re on a mission to empower the UK’s most
ambitious businesses. Since 2015, we’ve lent over $21
billion across the UK and US, helped create more than 58,000
new homes and 36,000 new jobs, and supported hundreds of
thousands of personal savers — all while fuelling the UK
economy.

Team Mission 🚀

About the Role :

We're hiring Junior Software Engineers recent Computer
Science graduates or early-career developers. You'll join
our new AI-native engineering team: small, highly autonomous
teams working in an entirely new way. With your peers,
you'll contribute across the full product development
lifecycle—design, build, test, and deploy— within a highly
autonomous pod.



This isn't an experiment at OakNorth. It's the clear
direction for all our development practices, and you'll be
at the forefront of this innovation.



You'll push the limits of modern AI tools, then turn that
capability into working systems used by real teams. We're
looking for curious builders—people who instinctively test,
compare, break, rebuild, and optimize. You'll help shape
what AI-native engineering culture looks like inside the
bank. The focus is execution: rapid prototyping, deployment,
and measurable impact.



Key Responsibilities

Requirements
responsibilities: Work within highly autonomous AI-native engineering pods on full product development lifecycle
Design, build, test, and deploy AI-powered systems and features
Push the limits of modern AI tools and transform capabilities into working production systems
Rapid prototyping with AI technologies to deliver measurable impact
Test, compare, break, rebuild, and optimize AI-powered solutions
Shape and define AI-native engineering culture and best practices within the organization
use_cases: AI-powered banking and financial services applications
Internal tools and workflows enhanced with AI capabilities
Rapid prototyping of AI-driven features for banking operations
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role explicitly involves pushing the limits of modern
AI tools and turning that capability into working systems.
As part of an "AI-native engineering team," the engineer
will work directly with AI technologies to build and deploy
AI-powered systems, making this an ai-first role focused on
hands-on AI application development.
